title: Follow-up Recommendation Output Schema
description: JSON Schema for rule-engine and Clinical Decision State Graph outputs that encode guideline-based lung nodule follow-up recommendations.

case_id.description: Unique identifier for this recommendation instance, typically composed from the source case and recommendation context.

recommendation_level.description: Normalized recommendation tier produced by the rule engine or CDSG.

recommendation_action.description: Human-readable action statement that describes the recommended next step for follow-up or management.

followup_interval.description: Recommended elapsed time before the next action, or null when the interval is not applicable or cannot be determined.

followup_modality.description: Recommended imaging or clinical modality for the next action, or null when no modality is applicable.

lung_rads_category.description: Assigned Lung-RADS category when the recommendation is anchored to lung cancer screening logic, or null when not applicable.

guideline_source.description: Primary guideline source or composite policy basis used to derive the recommendation.

guideline_anchor.description: Specific section, table, rule, or anchor text within the cited guideline that supports the recommendation.

reasoning_path.description: Ordered list of intermediate reasoning steps, predicates, or symbolic transitions used to reach the recommendation.

triggered_rules.description: List of internal rule identifiers that fired during recommendation generation.

input_facts_used.description: Structured subset of input facts that were consumed by the rule engine while producing this recommendation.

nodule_size_mm.description: Measured nodule size in millimeters that participated in the decision logic.

nodule_density.description: Reported nodule density class, such as solid, part-solid, or ground-glass, if consumed by the rules.

nodule_count.description: Number of nodules considered by the reasoning process when multiplicity affects follow-up logic.

change_status.description: Temporal status of the nodule, such as stable, new, or growing, when prior comparison was used.

patient_risk_level.description: Risk grouping of the patient used by the guideline logic, for example low-risk or high-risk.

smoking_eligible.description: Smoking eligibility assessment consumed by screening-related rules, encoded as the upstream structured value.

missing_information.description: List of missing facts that limited recommendation confidence or prevented a more specific recommendation.

uncertainty_note.description: Free-text explanation of uncertainty, ambiguity, or fallback behavior associated with the recommendation.

output_type.description: Origin classification describing how the recommendation output was generated.

generation_metadata.description: Versioning and provenance metadata for the recommendation generation run.

engine_version.description: Version identifier of the recommendation engine or CDSG executor.

generation_timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when this recommendation instance was generated in RFC 3339 date-time format.

rules_version.description: Version identifier of the encoded guideline ruleset used for inference.
